tasks.title: Add Yellow and Purple train colors to TRAIN_COLORS
tasks.description: Add yellow and purple color definitions to TRAIN_COLORS constant (body, hood, cab, cabDark, detail, cowcatcher, running). Update TRAIN_COLOR_ORDER to include all 5 colors.
tasks.acceptance: TRAIN_COLORS has 5 entries. TRAIN_COLOR_ORDER lists all 5.

tasks.title: Add CSS for yellow/purple palette trains + color selector dots
tasks.description: Add .palette-train-yellow and .palette-train-purple CSS classes. Add .color-selector container and .color-dot styles for 5 small colored circles below each palette train.
tasks.acceptance: Yellow/purple palette items have distinct backgrounds. Color dots appear below each palette train.

tasks.title: Implement palette color cycling and dot selection
tasks.description: Click palette train to cycle through 5 colors. Color dots allow direct color selection via click. setPaletteTrainColor updates data-type, CSS class, SVG, label, and dot active state. initPaletteColorDots creates dots for all palette train items (sidebar + drawer).
tasks.acceptance: Clicking palette train cycles color. Clicking dot jumps to that color. Both sidebar and drawer sync.

tasks.title: Update share link encoding for 5 colors
tasks.description: Expand colorToIdx and idxToColor in encodeGridState/decodeGridState to support yellow (3) and purple (4). Fallback to red for unknown indices.
tasks.acceptance: Share links with yellow/purple trains encode and decode correctly.

tasks.title: Update thumbnail and screenshot color maps
tasks.description: Add yellow (#FDD835) and purple (#7E57C2) to trainColorMap in renderThumbnail and renderScreenshotCanvas.
tasks.acceptance: Yellow/purple trains render in save thumbnails and screenshots.

tasks.title: Preserve color-selector during re-renders
tasks.description: Update rerenderPalette() and the resize handler to exclude .color-selector and .color-dot divs from cleanup. Call initPaletteColorDots() in init() after palette SVGs are rendered.
tasks.acceptance: Color dots persist across biome changes, window resizes, and re-renders.

testing_focus: Place all 5 train colors and verify SVG renders correctly
Cycle through all colors via palette click
Verify max 3 trains still enforced with 5 colors
Verify share link works with yellow/purple trains
Verify colors visible in both day and night modes
Verify screenshot captures all 5 colors correctly
Verify mobile drawer trains have same color dot functionality
Verify color dots survive biome change and window resize
